title: Garlicky Fluffy Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: Moist, flavorful chicken wrapped in a crunchy taco shell with a creamy green salsa and crispy radish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cumin, chili powder, and salt. Add chicken thighs and toss to coat.
Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until browned on both sides, about 6-7 minutes. Transfer chicken to a plate and cover with foil.
In the same skillet, heat remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Stir in green tomatillo salsa and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and let sauce simmer for 5 minutes.
Warm taco shells according to package instructions.
Shred cooked chicken with two forks and return to skillet with green salsa. Toss to coat.
Season chicken with additional salt and pepper to taste.
Assemble tacos by spooning chicken mixture into shells and topping with shredded cheese, cilantro, and radish slices.
Serve immediately and garnish with lime wedges.
